=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/nonObjectEffectServiceType_preview.ts(7,3): warning TS377048: Effect.Service requires the service type to be an object {} and not a primitive type. Consider wrapping the value in an object, or manually using Context.Tag or Effect.Tag if you want to use a primitive instead. effect(nonObjectEffectServiceType)


==== /.src/nonObjectEffectServiceType_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics nonObjectEffectServiceType:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export class BadService extends Effect.Service<BadService>()("BadService", {
      // @ts-expect-error
      succeed: "hello" as const
      ~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377048: Effect.Service requires the service type to be an object {} and not a primitive type. Consider wrapping the value in an object, or manually using Context.Tag or Effect.Tag if you want to use a primitive instead. effect(nonObjectEffectServiceType)
    }) {}
